name: Spice Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine the flour, sugar, baking powder, baking soda, cinnamon, nutmeg, cloves, and ginger.
2. Add buttermilk or sour milk, butter, shortening, and vanilla to the dry ingredients. Mix with an electric mixer on low to medium speed until combined.
3. Beat for 2 minutes at high speed.
4. Add eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition.
5. Pour batter into a greased 13 x 9 x 2-inch baking pan (inches).
6. Bake in a preheated oven at 350°F (degrees) for 30-35 minutes or until a toothpick inserted near the center comes out clean.
7. Cool on a wire rack.
